case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS. JAMILA S. BUTLER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 41.05 SERVED APR-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JAMILA S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, JAMILA S. $3,219.81 PRINCIPAL, $41.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,260.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
